title: OpenRouter Fusion: They OFFICIALLY CLAIM THAT THIS MODEL beats FABLE?
summary: OpenRouter launched Fusion API, a compound model that runs prompts across multiple models in parallel and uses a judge model to synthesize results. The creators claim it matches Fable-level performance at half the cost, but benchmarking appears limited to Deep Research tasks and practical tests show inconsistent performance on coding, math, and SVG generation.
writeup: The video examines OpenRouter's Fusion API, a compound model that runs a prompt across multiple models in parallel and uses a judge model to synthesize the outputs into one answer. It matters because the creators claim Fable-level performance at half the cost, an ensemble approach to test-time compute. The takeaways: the cited benchmarking is limited to Deep Research tasks, and hands-on tests across coding, math, and SVG generation show inconsistent results.
